scripts.build: node scripts/generate-brand-pages.js && node scripts/inject-video-schema.js && node scripts/generate-comparisons.js && node scripts/generate-guides.js && node scripts/generate-location-pages.js && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js && node scripts/generate-sw.js
scripts.sync-verify: npm run sync && npm run generate-comparisons && npm run verify-compare-quality
scripts.generate-pages: node scripts/generate-brand-pages.js && node scripts/inject-video-schema.js && node scripts/generate-comparisons.js
scripts.generate-all: npm run generate-pages && npm run generate-cavity && npm run generate-doorway && npm run generate-guides && npm run generate-location && npm run generate-sitemap && npm run generate-og-images && npm run generate-image-sitemap && npm run generate-rss && npm run build-link-graph && npm run validate-schema
scripts.sentinel: npm run uptime-check && npm run broken-link-check && npm run build-link-graph && npm run orphan-check
scripts.lint: node --check scripts/*.js scripts/sources/*.js scripts/utils/*.js tests/*.test.mjs && sh -c 'for f in public/scripts/ui/*.js; do node --input-type=module --check < "$f"; done'
